content: currently in chapter 3, running nautila, ramona, winkle and lotan. any suggestions for what I should build towards or pick up?
thread_title: New Player

content:
I've been playing for 2 days now and have so far been using Caecus, Goliath, Murphy, and Ramona but then I rolled Tulu and replaced Ramona with him. As I'm progressing through the story, i'm seeing that my way of building a team is not going to work in the long run. With the characters I've rolled so far, can someone suggest a good team build for me, please? I've only been rolling on the Aequor Realm Study banner. Should i keep rolling on it until I get all of the Aequor characters, or should I roll on another banner to help fill out a better team?

Any advice will be greatly appreciated. Thank you.
thread_title: Please help with team building

content:
Not a pro by any means so take all I will say with the grain of salt (Lmao, Aequor banner moment), but here we go:
1) check on Flare's guide, it's ***EXTEMELY*** helpful for the new players, although it might look intimidating, there is lots of useful info in it -- https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1cC7FOebdy_J2hONmVT1QUSk6SxIRTuVoI4XADVlq5JU/edit?pli=1&amp%3Bgid=525060342&gid=110428514#gid=110428514
2) Aurora's speed comp utilizes your exact characters: Tulu, Goliath, Caecus and Ramona, so you already has a very viable composition that will get you through most of the campaign - just find the right wheels for it or go for the Costco builds (Look it up for more details in section *Start +Endgame comps* & *Costco (Arc1) build* in Flare's Guide)
3) I think your top banner could work atm, basically do a full Aequor Realm banner or if you want to expand for the other comps in the future roll of Nautilla, since she will pair nicely with *my favorite salty twink* with their riposte damage or any other comps you might wanna do in the future.
4) If you gonna roll for the other banners, do look for what to roll - some character are not that good unless you have some good matchups for them, and boy oh boy it's gonna be resource heavy to get them in viable state.

Hope that helps!

||Also drop a me like and a follow, please! XD - UID 101135080 or even if you feel even more generous you can activate this invite to help me get the doll 05VK2D6SUD ||

content:
Here is my take: go for Caecus (best defense + heals, and riposte damage) + Thais (debuffs and heals) + Aigis (damage and stuns) and that smug ass Uvhash(damage, damage), that's should be a good comp or either Faint (if you need more defense or survivability).

Also, agree with iibenigml, doresan is a generally a good choice of Damage focused character, since he can clean big crowds and bosses with ease.

But for the future try to build something like this: 
1) Meta for babyeaters 
2) variation with Horla
3) Umbral variaton

thread_title: need advice

content:
Spent 30 years trying to get tulu off blue banner so I can swap to wheel jail. Pulled on the paid banner and got tulu and Murphy, with a random ssr chara pull item giving me a Murphy dupe.

Looking for a little advice on who I should use a free dupe item on at this point. It’s probably between Miryam and tulu right? 

Also wondering if I should do caecus, Miryam, tulu and Murphy once I get her up to speed or if I should keep Goliath or aim for corpo or someone else? I think I read that adding corpo would shift the dps focus from tulu onto her but my account is still only a week or two old so I’m open to input! Thank you for any advice!
thread_title: Tentacle dupe priority

content: aim for corpo e2, build aurita over time (one dupe per month, 7 months until oe) play miryam aurita tulu corpo, then youll have a machine gun.
